title: WorkstationProfile
description: A typed SourceOS workstation profile tying together package layers, desktop posture, launcher surfaces, and validation entrypoints.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.1.0".

channel.description: Realization channel such as linux-dev or linux-stable.

packageManifestRef.description: Optional reference to the PackageManifest defining layered package sets.

desktopProfileRef.description: Optional reference to the DesktopProfile defining desktop posture.

launcherProviderRef.description: Optional reference to the primary LauncherProvider.

launcherActionRefs.description: Optional references to LauncherAction objects surfaced by this workstation profile.

macOnLinuxPolish.description: Mac-on-Linux polish signal set. Implementation authority: SociOS-Linux/source-os. Use 'status: active' for signals that are live in SociOS-Linux/source-os; use 'planned' or 'non-goal' to record intent or explicit exclusions.

status.description: Implementation state of the Mac-on-Linux polish surface for this profile. Use 'active' for features shipped in SociOS-Linux/source-os, 'planned' for accepted follow-on work, and 'non-goal' to explicitly record excluded features.

screenshotHelperCommand.description: Shell command providing Mac-style screenshot capture (e.g. sourceos-screenshot).

quickLookPackages.description: Package names providing Quick Look / Sushi-compatible file preview support.

keymapPolicyRef.description: URN reference to a KeymapProfile expressing the Mac-keyboard remap policy.
